Brief explanation/opinion:
I would go with something similar to 26 for the main figure, I think I'd use the figures that include the tumor cells. 
I'd use CID4465 slides (12,13,14), 22, 27 as supplementary figures.

I'd use something similar as 26 to show GCLCVIM, without the pie panel (I'd use this as supplementary too)
